title: Avaritia Spear
description: An addon for Re-Avaritia that brings the infinity spear to life.
body:
Avaritia: Spear

An addon for Re-Avaritia that brings the infinity spear to life.

Features:
Infinity Spear — A cosmic-tier spear crafted with infinity ingots, inheriting all spear mechanics from Spear Core
Instant Kill— Left-click jab and right-click charge both deal infinite damage (configurable via Avaritia's endless damage toggle)
Indestructible — Implements IUndamageable, never takes durability loss
Built-in Enchantments — Comes with Looting X by default
Extended Range — +7 attack reach distance
Immortal Drop — Cannot be destroyed by lava, explosions, or the void
Cosmic Rarity — Matching Re-Avaritia's cosmic item tier with animated tooltip
Stellar Piercing — Full charge attack visual and audio feedback

Dependencies:
Re-Avaritia 1.3.9.9+
Spear Core 1.0.0+
NeoForge 21.1+
